user.title: Keep Cool — Setup
user.description: Choose your weather source and the indoor temperature you want to maintain.

data_description.weather_entity: The weather integration that provides hourly forecasts for your location.
data_description.comfort_temp: Windows will be opened when outdoor air is cooler than this, and closed when it rises above it.

rooms_menu.title: Keep Cool — Rooms
rooms_menu.description: Add the rooms whose windows you want to track. You can add as many as you like.

data.name: Room name
data.auto_control_blinds: Automatically close blind when sun hits the window

data_description.facing: Which compass direction this room's main window faces.
data_description.blind_entity: If you have a smart blind or cover for this window, select it here.
data_description.auto_control_blinds: Keep Cool will close the blind when the sun is shining through this window and open it again when the sun moves away.

finish.title: Keep Cool — Done!
finish.description: Your rooms are saved. Keep Cool will now track the schedule and control blinds automatically.

error.weather_entity_not_found: That entity was not found. Make sure your weather integration is loaded.

data.name: Room name
data.auto_control_blinds: Automatically close blind when sun hits the window
